doc_title_en: Notice of Board Endorsement and Shareholder Neutrality Opinion Regarding Public Tender Offer for RISE Inc. Shares by JTM Holdings; Transfer of Consolidated Subsidiary Shares; Dividend on Preferred Shares

key_facts.reason_jp: 公開買付者による連結子会社化

summary_en: JTM Holdings (hotel, travel, real estate, retail, medical, e-commerce operator) to acquire 55,211,079 shares (common 48,966,772 + preferred 6,244,307) at ¥17/share. Tender period May 18–Jun 12, 2026 (20 business days; extendable to 30 days). Post-acquisition ownership 53.99%. Board recommends; shareholders decide on tendering. Concurrent: subsidiary FRE transferred to parent Youtei Holdings; preferred dividend of ¥X (amount not disclosed) settled via offset against FRE proceeds.
summary_jp: JTMホールディングスが55,211,079株（普通株48,966,772＋優先株6,244,307）を1株17円で公開買付。買付期間2026年5月18日～6月12日（20営業日、延長可能30営業日）。取得後所有割合53.99%。取締役会は賛同、応募は株主判断。同時にFRE資産をヨウテイホールディングスに譲渡、優先株配当相殺。
tag_en: MBO - JTM Holdings - ¥17/share (common & preferred) - 55.21M shares - 53.99% post-acquisition - May 18–Jun 12, 2026
tag_jp: MBO - JTMホールディングス - ¥17/株 - 55.21M株 - 取得後53.99% - 2026年5月18日～6月12日
